items.question: What is the Model Poses Ideation AI workflow?
items.answer: Model Poses Ideation is an AI workflow that generates pose ideas and visual references for fashion, beauty, fitness, and portrait shoots. It focuses on compositions and body language that highlight garments, products, or stories before you step into the studio.

items.question: What kind of input should I provide for pose generation?
items.answer: Start with a clear shoot brief: wardrobe, mood, framing (full body, half-body, close-up), and any movement limitations. You can also describe model type, product focus, and share reference ideas to guide the AI.

items.question: Can I upload reference images to guide the poses?
items.answer: Yes. The workflow is designed for text plus optional image references. Uploading sample poses, campaign visuals, or inspiration images helps the AI propose poses that stay closer to your desired direction.

items.question: Who is this template best suited for?
items.answer: Model Poses Ideation is built for fashion and beauty photographers, stylists and art directors, fitness and sports brands, and modeling agencies who need structured pose ideas for campaigns and shoots.

items.question: Does the workflow output final shoot-ready images?
items.answer: The goal is to create pose references and visual guides—not final campaign imagery. You use the outputs as a posing library and shot planning tool for real-world photo or video production.

items.question: How can I use the pose references on set?
items.answer: You can export poses into shot lists, print them as reference boards, or view them on devices during the shoot to communicate ideas with photographers, models, and clients.

items.question: How are credits used when running Model Poses Ideation?
items.answer: Each generation consumes credits depending on the underlying image models and workflow steps. You can start with smaller pose batches to explore directions before generating larger pose libraries.
